## Checklist

- [ ] I linked a valid `.aitask` task.
- [ ] The risk tier matches `task.yaml`.
- [ ] Required approvals are recorded.
- [ ] Required ADR links are included or explicitly not required.
- [ ] Evidence references are complete.
- [ ] Rollback planning is documented.
- [ ] Exceptions or waivers are disclosed.
